intent: Write a 'hosting dinner for 6 under $120' grocery-and-gear plan combining storefront and community wisdom. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the home-kitchen and grocery-gourmet-food categories and collect at least 5 products relevant to hosting (serveware, drink, staple food, spice, beverage). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/AskReddit for posts on cheap crowd-pleasers and host mistakes. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) propose a $120 menu + serveware plan with running totals, (b) use community wisdom to dodge common host failures, (c) close with the single dish everyone should include. Cite every claim.
